case_title: TAEHOON DAVID AHN VS. DARIN SAMUEL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHN, TAEHOON DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SAMUEL, DARIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-17-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TAEHOON DAVID AHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARIN SAMUEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF COURT CALENDAR TO DEC-12-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE/SEE SIGNED BY RECD LINE** SERVED JUN-23-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAMUEL, DARIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,732.63 FILED BY AHN, TAEHOON DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SAMUEL, DARIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
